task_completion.description: Open the ExamAnxiety dataset in JASP
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP window shows the data spreadsheet with columns including 'Exam', 'Anxiety', and 'Revise'.
The analysis panel on the left shows 'K-Nearest Neighbors Regression' or 'K-Nearest Neighbors' under a Machine Learning/Regression section.

task_completion.description: Set the target and feature variables
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the analysis panel, 'Exam' is placed in the 'Target' box, and 'Anxiety' and 'Revise' are placed in the 'Features' box.

task_completion.description: Configure the model parameters (K=5, 80% split, seed 42)
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the analysis panel, 'Training Data Proportion' is set to 0.8 (or 80%), 'Seed' is set to 42, and 'Number of Nearest Neighbors' (K) is set to 5.

task_completion.description: Include the Predicted vs. Observed plot
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the JASP results pane on the right, a plot titled 'Predicted vs. Observed' is visible under the K-Nearest Neighbors Regression results.
A save dialog is visible saving the file as 'knn_exam_results.jasp' in the /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ directory, or the JASP window title bar shows 'knn_exam_results.jasp'.

integrity.description: The agent used the JASP graphical user interface to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the JASP application windows, menus, and dialogs, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The results appear to be genuinely computed by JASP.
integrity.visual_evidence: The results pane shows properly formatted JASP tables and plots, not manually typed text or mockups.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI using a script.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of a python script or terminal command being used to directly generate the .jasp file without GUI interaction.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset is located at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ExamAnxiety.csv. The target variable is 'Exam' and feature variables are 'Anxiety' and 'Revise'. The KNN regression model must be configured with K=5 (nearest neighbors), an 80% training split (0.8), and a random seed of 42. The expected output file is /home/ga/Documents/JASP/knn_exam_results.jasp.
